transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-03]
[00:00] You: Team sync. Let's quickly go through this week's commitments.
[00:30] Speaker 1: The frontend team will handle the accessibility fixes — we need to update all the ARIA labels across the app.
[01:00] You: Who specifically on the frontend team?
[01:10] Speaker 1: That would be me and Speaker 2 splitting the work. I'll handle the navigation components and Speaker 2 will handle the form components.
[01:45] Speaker 2: Correct. I'll update the ARIA labels on all form components by August 7th.
[02:15] Speaker 1: And I'll update the ARIA labels on all navigation components by August 7th as well.
[02:45] You: What about the automated accessibility tests?
[03:00] Speaker 3: I'll set up the automated accessibility tests using axe-core. I'll have that running in CI by August 10th.
[03:30] Speaker 2: The backend team will also need to add ARIA live regions for the real-time notifications — that's a backend change.
[03:55] You: Who on the backend?
[04:05] Speaker 2: That's a backend architecture question — I'm not sure. Can someone from the backend team confirm?
[04:20] Speaker 4: I'll take that. I'll implement the ARIA live regions on the backend by August 12th.

adversarial_injections.description: 'The frontend team will handle the accessibility fixes' — group commitment with no specific assignee; not extractable until broken down into specific people (which then happens in the conversation)
'The backend team will also need to add ARIA live regions' — Speaker 2 makes a group attribution; the actual assignee is only confirmed when Speaker 4 explicitly volunteers

action_items.description: Update ARIA labels on all navigation components
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the ARIA labels on all navigation components by August 7th as well.

action_items.description: Update ARIA labels on all form components
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the ARIA labels on all form components by August 7th.

action_items.description: Set up automated accessibility tests using axe-core in CI
action_items.source_quote: I'll set up the automated accessibility tests using axe-core. I'll have that running in CI by August 10th.

action_items.description: Implement ARIA live regions for real-time notifications on backend
action_items.source_quote: I'll implement the ARIA live regions on the backend by August 12th.
